titlestmt.titleproper: Paul Mellon Centre for Studies in British Art newsletters
Paul Mellon Centre for Studies in British Art newsletters
titlestmt.author: Compiled by YCBA Archives Staff, Meg Rinn

publicationstmt.publisher: Yale Center for British Art, Archives

maintenanceagency.agencyname: Yale Center for British Art, Archives

descriptivenote.p: Finding aid description and metadata in Archives at Yale are licensed under a CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. This means that anyone may copy, modify, and distribute this descriptive metadata without restriction or permission. The CC0 license is explained in full on the Creative Commons website: CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. More information is available on our Help page.

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Monday December 1, 2025 at 18:01

did.unittitle: Paul Mellon Centre for Studies in British Art newsletters

corpname.part: Yale Center for British Art, Archives
Paul Mellon Centre for Studies in British Art

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This collection consists of the biannual newsletters for the Paul Mellon Centre for Studies in British Art from the charity's inaugural issue in December 1995 to May 2017.

bioghist.head: Biographical / Historical
bioghist.p: The Paul Mellon Centre for Studies in British Art, founded in 1970, is an educational charity committed to supporting original research into the history of British art and architecture of all periods. The Centre contains an extensive library and manuscript collection, with over 12,000 books about British art. It is the sister institution to the Yale Center for British Art, with which it collaborates closely, and is part of Yale University.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The collection is open for research.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Paul Mellon Centre for Studies in British Art newsletters. Yale Center for British Art, Archives.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Organized into two series: Series I. Paul Mellon Centre for Studies in British Art Newsletters, 1995 - 2014; Series II. PMC Notes, 2015 - 2017.

did.unittitle: Series I. Paul Mellon Centre for Studies in British Art Newsletters

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This series contains the Paul Mellon Centre for Studies in British Art's newsletter.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This series contains the second iteration of the Paul Mellon Centre for Studies in British Art's newsletter, titled "PMC Notes."
